zh.Walcot, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾瓦爾可特
zh.Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾史福斯波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Wolcott I於1450年出生在英國史洛普爾瓦爾可特時，他的父親Roger Wolcott26歲，母親Margaret Lloyd23歲。他和Joan Sperry至少有1個兒子。他去世於1501年9月19日在英國史洛普爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Wolcott I于1450年出生在英国史洛普爾瓦爾可特时，他的父亲Roger Wolcott26岁，母亲Margaret Lloyd23岁。他和Joan Sperry至少有1个儿子。他去世于1501年9月19日在英国史洛普爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wolcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Surrey): habitational name from Wollacott in Thrushelton (Devon), named from the Old English personal name Wulfnōth + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

History: Henry Wolcott (1578–1655), clothier, came from Tolland, Somerset, England, and settled in Windsor, CT, in 1636. His grandson Roger (1679–1767) was colonial governor of CT; his great-grandson Oliver (1726–1797) was a signer of the Declaration of Independence.

variants.name: Woolcock
meanings: English (Cornwall): probably a variant of   Wolcott  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Wolcott I was born in 1450, in Walcot, Shropshire, England, his father, Roger Wolcott, was 26 and his mother, Margaret Lloyd, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Joan Sperry. He died on 19 September 1501, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Wolcott I est né en 1450, à Walcot, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger Wolcott, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Lloyd, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joan Sperry. Il est décédé le 19 septembre 1501, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Wolcott I 1450 in Walcot, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Wolcott 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Lloyd 23. Er hatte mit Joan Sperry mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 19. September 1501 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Wolcott I è nato il nel 1450 nel Walcot, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Roger Wolcott, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Lloyd, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joan Sperry. Morì il 19 settembre 1501, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Wolcott Iが1450年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワルコトで生まれた時，父Roger Wolcottは26歳，母Margaret Lloydは23歳であった。彼はJoan Sperryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1501年9月19日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Wolcott I(이)가 1450년 영국 슈럽실르 월컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Wolcott(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Lloyd(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Joan Sperry(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1501년 9월 19일 영국 슈럽실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Wolcott I nasceu em 1450, em Walcot, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Wolcott, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Lloyd, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joan Sperry. Ele faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1501, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Wolcott I родился в 1450 г. в местности валкот, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Wolcott было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Lloyd, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joan Sperry. Он умер 19 сентября 1501 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Wolcott I nació en 1450, en Walcot, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Wolcott, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Lloyd, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joan Sperry. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1501, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
